elements.x: :root { --wg-bg: #FFFFFF; --wg-fg: #09090B; --wg-accent: #09090B; --wg-mark-font: "SF Mono", Menlo, "Courier New", monospace; --wg-mono: "SF Mono", Menlo, "Courier New", monospace; --wg-muted: #71717A; --wg-border: #E4E4E7; --wg-border-heavy: #09090B; --wg-highlight: #DC2626; }

.wg-presence { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 2147483644; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0; pointer-events: auto; } .wg-presence-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--wg-fg, #09090B); opacity: 0.4; animation: wg-breathe 4s ease-in-out infinite; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; } .wg-presence-pill { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 0; max-width: 0; overflow: hidden; opacity: 0; transition: max-width 200ms ease-out, opacity 150ms ease-out, padding 200ms ease-out; white-space: nowrap; font-family: var(--wg-mono, monospace); font-size: 11px; color: var(--wg-fg, #09090B); } .wg-presence:hover .wg-presence-pill { max-width: 320px; opacity: 1; padding: 6px 12px 6px 10px; } .wg-presence:hover .wg-presence-dot { opacity: 0.8; animation: none; } .wg-presence-label { color: var(--wg-muted, #A1A1AA); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .wg-presence-btn { background: none; border: 1px solid var(--wg-border, #E4E4E7); color: var(--wg-fg, #09090B); font-family: var(--wg-mono, monospace); font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .wg-presence-btn:hover { background: var(--wg-fg, #09090B); color: var(--wg-bg, #fff); } .wg-presence-btn--muted { border-color: transparent; color: var(--wg-muted, #A1A1AA); } .wg-presence-btn--muted:hover { background: var(--wg-muted, #A1A1AA); color: var(--wg-bg, #fff); } @keyframes wg-breathe { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; } 50% { opacity: 0.6; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .wg-presence-dot { animation: none; opacity: 0.4; } .wg-presence-pill { transition: none; } }
